name: vendor.myndhyve.campaign-sequence
description: MyndHyve campaign-sequence step executors — three pure-control nodes (wait, tag, condition) lifted from src/canvas-types/campaign-studio/sequences/sequenceStepModules.ts. Self-contained: only ctx.inputs + ctx.log; no host capabilities required beyond core NodeContext. The integration siblings (email, sms, webhook) ship in a follow-up pack once openwop NodeContext extensions for host.email / host.sms / host.http land.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Sequence Wait
nodes.description: Completes a wait step whose due time was scheduled by enrollment state. Pure passthrough — the host's enrollment scheduler decides WHEN to fire the node; this executor signals completion.

nodes.label: Sequence Tag
nodes.description: Applies a sequence tag action. Validates that step.tagAction and step.tagName are set; emits a debug log; returns success. The actual tag-application side-effect is the responsibility of an upstream/downstream host node that reads the enrollment record.

nodes.label: Sequence Condition
nodes.description: Evaluates enrollment data against step.conditions[] and returns the nextStepId for the matching branch (step.yesNextStepId or step.noNextStepId). Pure function — only reads ctx.inputs. Supports 17 condition operators (equals, contains, greater_than, matches_regex, etc.) and AND/OR logic via step.conditionLogic.
